appDescription.message: A fixed Chrome side panel for switching between multiple AI websites and custom AI tools.

fallbackDefaultTitle.message: This AI cannot be embedded in the side panel

fallbackDefaultText.message: Some AI websites block iframe embedding. You can still copy the prompt or continue on the official website.

rememberLastUsedHint.message: When enabled, the last selected AI opens first.

advancedEmbeddingCompatHint.message: Try to reduce blank pages or iframe restrictions on some AI websites.

grokLoginHint.message: For first-time Grok use, finish X login in the side panel or on the official website.

cookieLoginHint.message: If cookie prompts or login state keep reappearing, complete login and cookie settings once on the official website.

officialSiteFallbackTitle.message: $AI_NAME$ will open on its official website

officialSiteFallbackText.message: This service is not reliable when embedded in the side panel. Please continue on the official website.

fallbackTitle.message: $AI_NAME$ may not be embeddable in the side panel

fallbackText.message: If the page is blank or login fails, copy the prompt or continue on the official website.

keepOneVisibleAi.message: Keep at least one AI visible

promptCopyFailed.message: Copy failed. Please copy it manually from the fallback page.

promptPreviewEmpty.message: When fallback actions are needed, the prompt will appear here.

promptSummarizeSelection.message: Summarize the selected text below. Extract key points, conclusions, and next actions:

promptNoSelectionSummarize.message: No selected text was detected. Please summarize based on the page information.

promptTranslateSelection.message: Translate the following content into English while preserving proper nouns:

promptRewriteSelection.message: Rewrite the following content to make it clearer, more natural, and professional:

promptExplainSelection.message: Explain the meaning, background, and key points of the following content:

promptSummarizePage.message: Summarize the current page, including core content, key conclusions, important details, and anything I should pay attention to.
